message:
fix: enrich session store deserialization errors with source context

When serde_json::from_str fails during session loading, the bare
serde error lacks context about which file or JSON blob was malformed.
Wrap these errors with Error::session() that includes the failing JSON
content (for session entries and headers) or file path (for manifests)
so debugging corrupt session files doesn't require a debugger.

Also refactors header row retrieval to use into_iter().next() instead
of .first() to avoid borrowing the temporary Vec, and adds a missing
closing brace in session_store_v2 proptests module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
